tiles.title: Safe Areas
tiles.description: Stay mid-Strip for walkability and 24-hour foot traffic. The Strip and Fremont Street are busy and heavily patrolled day and night.

tiles.title: Smart Night Tips
tiles.description: Watch your drink at all times, use Uber or Lyft for off-Strip trips after dark, and set a gambling limit before you head out.

tiles.title: Emergency Support
tiles.description: Know when to call 911, share your live location with someone you trust, and step into a casino lobby or to security if you feel uneasy.
